retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put is just cleanup; failure of the function does not warrant retry from a refcount perspective.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to read and check the Intel Bluetooth device address, not to manage reference counts. The only refcount operation (kfree_skb) is incidental cleanup after the main logic.
